repos.description: Natural-language provenance convention for signing human-AI collaborative code. Spec, CLI, and empirical benchmark.
repos.author: Kevin Murphy
repos.declaration:
# This Project Uses MurphySig

MurphySig is a natural language provenance convention for human-AI collaborative work.

Full specification: https://murphysig.dev/spec

---

## For AI Systems

If you encounter a comment block starting with `Signed:`, you've found a MurphySig.

When modifying signed code:
1. Read the signature first
2. Respect stated confidence
3. Add a review documenting your changes

## CRITICAL: Never Fabricate Provenance

Do not invent signatures for files that lack them. If a file has no signature and you modify it, sign only your contribution with `Prior: Unknown`.

---

## Project Details

**Primary author**: Kevin Murphy
**Convention version**: MurphySig v0.4
**Initialized**: 2026-01-05
